code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      nums = match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        nums
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(cur)
  nums = match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    nums
  end
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut cur_max = 0
mut first = true
mut j = 0
let total = nums.len()
while j < total
  let x = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    cur_max = x
    first = false
  else if x > cur_max
    cur_max = x
  end
  result = list.push(result, cur_max)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let rl = result.len()
while k < rl
  let v = match result.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
